privileged_info_summary: The task is a synthetic simulation task that updates Bridge Command navigator simulator world files. The metadata claims three key parameters: ground_truth_path (/var/lib/bridgecommand/task_data/ground_truth.json), target_world_dir (Solent_v2026), and coordinate_tolerance (0.001 decimal degrees). All three metadata values are verified correct and used by the verifier. The task dynamically generates a Notice to Mariners document with randomized coordinates for the Horse Sand buoy relocation (0.2-0.5 nautical miles south shift per instance) and a Wreck buoy addition (0.8nm west). The base Horse Sand position is approximately 50.7588°N, -1.0878°W, which matches real-world coordinates (50.76037°N, -1.08538°W from Mapcarta within ~0.002°). All coordinates in Bridge Command use decimal degrees format. The task requires agents to read the auto-generated NTM, copy/rename a world directory, update INI configuration files (buoy.ini, light.ini, description.ini) with correct object positions and counts, and pass verification with score ≥85/100.
